title: phylica costata
intro: Phylica costata, also known as the 'River Bushwillow', is a species of flowering plant in the family Rhamnaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Phylica costata include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, as well as its use as a natural remedy for digestive problems. The herbal preparations of Phylica costata typically involve infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
